inputs.system_description: A webhook receiver that runs agent workflows from GitHub PR comments.
inputs.scope: Trust boundary is the public webhook endpoint. Out of scope: GitHub's own auth.

expected_outputs.threat_model: Assets: workflow runner, repo tokens. Actors: PR commenters (untrusted), maintainers. Boundaries: public webhook. Abuse paths: comment injection to trigger unintended runs; token exfiltration via crafted prompt. Mitigations below.

map.mitigation: treat comment bodies as untrusted; require maintainer label to run
scope tokens per-repo; never echo secrets into model context

notes: Enumerates assets, actors, boundaries, and abuse paths and maps each abuse path to a mitigation.
